---
title: ""
subtitle: ""
format: html
#page-layout: article
header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="_assets/index.css">
resources:
  - _assets/index.css
---


```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-overlay"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <h1>Abdelkarim el Ghani</h1>
    <h2>Data Analyst | Neuroscientist</h2>
    <p>Welcome to my portfolio! Explore my projects and skills.</p>
    <a href="projects.qmd" class="hero-button">Explore Projects</a>
    <a href="about.qmd" class="hero-button hero-button-secondary">Learn More About Me</a>
  </div>
</div>






```
